This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
gemini-mcp-tool execAsync Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of gemini-mcp-tool. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability.

The specific flaw exists within the implementation of the execAsync method. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of a user-supplied string before using it to execute a system call. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the service account. Was ZDI-CAN-27783.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-28qq-5f47-r5x2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:44:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-28qq-5f47-r5x2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-28qq-5f47-r5x2"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-01-23T04:16:02Z", "published_at": "2026-01-23T06:31:23Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0755", "https://www.zerodayinitiative.com/advisories/ZDI-26-021", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-28qq-5f47-r5x2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jamubc/gemini-mcp-tool", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: gemini-mcp-tool vulnerable to OS command injection and @file exfiltration via prompt quoting (CVE-2026-0755)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:44:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-28qq-5f47-r5x2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "gemini-mcp-tool"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.1.2, < 1.1.6"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:44:49Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: gemini-mcp-tool vulnerable to OS command injection and @file exfiltration via prompt quoting (CVE-2026-0755)
